title: carduus lactifolius
intro: Carduus lactifolius, also known as white thistle or milk thistle, is a plant species that belongs to the aster family and is native to Europe and Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its seeds, which contain a compound called silymarin, a flavonoid complex that protects the liver and has anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Carduus lactifolius include liver protection, improved digestion, and reduced inflammation, making it a popular herbal remedy for various conditions, including liver disease, gallstones, and digestive issues. Carduus lactifolius is commonly prepared as a dietary supplement in capsule or tablet form, as well as in herbal teas and extracts, making it easily accessible for those seeking its medicinal benefits.
